sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 71:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 71:1
items.html: A place of bestowal is called anterior, and the place through which it does not bestow is called posterior. It makes no difference if that place is bestowal of GAR or bestowal of VAK. (Inner Light, Item‎ 40)
